summary: Implementation is largely aligned with CR-00091 goals, but self-assessment found a TDD RED evidence contract miss (S02) and a previously flagged regex robustness risk in rewrite_down_revision.

a_regex_three_forms.details: S01 tests cover plain, type-annotated, and None forms. S03 identified a residual line-based regex false-positive risk.

b_head_excludes_pending.details: Resolver computes head from non-PENDING migrations; S02 single-trailing-PENDING test rewrites to immediate predecessor B, not root A.

c_migration_check_noop_pipeline.details: S06 make migration-check passed with explicit no-op message and successful round-trip tests; no related regressions in S10/S11.

d_skills_sync_divergence.details: No divergence detected between skills/ and .claude/skills/ for iw-new-cr, iw-new-feature, iw-new-incident.

e_docs_consistency_three_skills.details: Migration convention insertion wording is identical across iw-new-cr, iw-new-feature, iw-new-incident (and mirrors).

tdd_red_evidence_s01_s02.details: S01 RED evidence is assertion-style and plausible; S02 RED evidence is ModuleNotFoundError (not assertion-style), violating stated requirement.

recommended_followups: Amend S02 report RED evidence to include a true behavior-level assertion failure snippet.
Consider hardening rewrite_down_revision parsing to avoid non-code/docstring accidental matches (as flagged in S03).
